name: Capelli D'angelo with Thai Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Boneless, skinless chicken breasts, cubed
1/2 Red pepper, cut into julienne strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, heat oil; sauté chicken until golden. Remove chicken and set aside.
2. In a clean skillet, combine broth, honey, and soy sauce; whisk in peanut butter, corn starch, and ginger.
3. Add green onions and garlic; cook, stirring constantly over low heat until blended and smooth.
4. Add red pepper and reserved chicken; cook and stir until just bubbly and thickened.
5. Cook Capelli d'Angelo according to package directions.
6. Spoon the chicken mixture over Capelli d'Angelo and serve topped with parsley.
Makes 6 servings.
